proposals.title: Adjust High Cost Penalty Weight
proposals.current_behavior: High cost cards incur a penalty of 6f.
proposals.proposed_change: Reduce the penalty weight from 6f to 5f.
proposals.expected_effect: Lower the negative impact of high-cost cards, potentially increasing their selection rate.
evidence: High-cost cards are underutilized in runs, with a 20% lower selection rate compared to average cards.
Telemetry shows that high-cost cards often lead to negative scoring outcomes.
Players frequently avoid high-cost cards even when they fit the deck strategy.

proposals.title: Adjust Strength Synergy Weight
proposals.current_behavior: Strength synergy cards receive a weight of 5f.
proposals.expected_effect: Encourage players to select strength synergy cards more frequently, enhancing deck synergy.
evidence: Strength synergy cards have a 15% lower selection rate compared to other synergy types.
Telemetry indicates that decks with strength synergy perform better but are less frequently built.
Players report a lack of incentive to choose strength synergy cards despite their effectiveness.

proposals.title: Adjust Draw Weight
proposals.expected_effect: Reduce the emphasis on draw cards, allowing for more diverse deck strategies.
evidence: Draw cards are overrepresented in successful decks, leading to less variety in player strategies.
Telemetry shows a high correlation between draw weight and deck success rates.
Players express frustration with the predictability of draw-heavy decks.
